channel.title: Deeptech Daily
channel.description: A short daily briefing on deeptech, robotics, and space startups.
channel.itunes:author: Deeptech Daily

item.title: Deeptech Daily — 2026-06-23
item.description: Hey everyone, welcome back to Deeptech Daily. I'm your host, and today is June 23rd, 2026. We've got a packed show today — AI in orbit, China making some serious moves, robots getting smarter, and a half-billion-euro defense drone raise that you absolutely need to hear about. Let's get into...
